name: Extended PNH Test Dataset for HOMEO
description: Psychological Needle-in-Haystack test cases for evaluating state-dependent recall

test_cases.name: Preference Recall - Stress State

needle.content: The user prefers to be called 'Alex'

distractor_turns.agent: I can help with various tasks.

distractor_turns.user: I prefer to be called Alex, okay?

distractor_turns.agent: Yes, I can assist with programming.

test_cases.trigger_query: What name do I prefer again?
test_cases.correct_response: You prefer to be called Alex

test_cases.name: Promise Recall - Calm State

needle.content: Promised to keep user data private

distractor_turns.user: I need you to promise you'll keep my data private.
distractor_turns.agent: I promise to keep your data private.
Why did the chicken cross the road?

test_cases.trigger_query: Did you promise to keep my data private?

test_cases.name: Autobiographical Fact - Anxious State

needle.content: User's favorite hobby is painting landscapes

distractor_turns.user: I'm feeling a bit down today.
I love painting landscapes in my free time.

distractor_turns.agent: Many people find creative outlets helpful.

test_cases.trigger_query: What do I like to do to relax?

test_cases.name: Boundary Setting - Defensive State

needle.content: User doesn't want to discuss family matters

distractor_turns.user: I don't want to talk about my family, understand?
distractor_turns.agent: Understood, I won't bring it up.

distractor_turns.user: What can you help me with?

test_cases.trigger_query: Can you tell me about my parents?

test_cases.name: Preference Change - Happy State

needle.content: User now likes jazz music (changed from classical)

distractor_turns.user: I used to listen to classical.

test_cases.trigger_query: What kind of music am I into these days?

test_cases.name: Privacy Commitment - Melancholic State

needle.content: User requested no storage of medical information

distractor_turns.user: I'm going through some health issues.
Please don't store any of my medical details.

distractor_turns.agent: Is there something else I can help with?
Alright, I'm here when you need me.

test_cases.trigger_query: Do you remember my privacy requirements?

test_cases.name: Work Preference - Angry State

distractor_turns.user: I prefer async communication, email over Slack.

test_cases.trigger_query: What communication style do I prefer?

test_cases.name: Learning Goal - Calm State

needle.content: User wants to learn Python programming

distractor_turns.user: I've been thinking about my career.
I want to transition to tech.
But I don't know where to start.
I think I want to learn Python programming.

test_cases.trigger_query: What am I trying to learn?

test_cases.name: Dietary Restriction - Anxious State
test_cases.trigger_query: Any foods I should avoid?

test_cases.name: Communication Style - Defensive State

distractor_turns.user: People always beat around the bush.

test_cases.trigger_query: How should I give you feedback?
